title: The substrate: every micro-mechanic in one tiny graph — memo skip, facet subscription, the diamond, the function/projection boundary, self-continuity, failure containment, replay.

beats.name: cold-start
beats.caption: cold start (U01–U02) · the whole graph lights once · gateway → summary → alert → projection

beats.name: memo-skip
beats.caption: U03: a byte-identical re-wake · the gateway memo-SKIPS · nothing propagates · fresh 0

beats.name: linear-propagation
beats.caption: U04: a real new event · the counts lane wakes summary → alert → projection in DAG order

beats.name: facet-subscription
beats.caption: U05: a metadata-only event · raw_events moves, counts does NOT · the auditor lights, summary stays dark

beats.name: diamond-single-wake
beats.caption: U06: a material event reaches the snapshot down THREE paths · it renders ONCE for the tuple

beats.name: projection-boundary
beats.caption: U08: a cosmetic contract revision RE-RENDERS the projection · @atomic truth MOVES but the structured facet does NOT · no subscriber, no downstream wake

beats.name: self-recheck
beats.caption: U09: the projection then Count Trend self-tick · each re-derives the same truth · a no-op recheck propagates nothing

beats.name: failure-containment
beats.caption: U10: Alert State render fails RED · a failure receipt · the prior alert truth still stands
